title: How to link boards from different organizations?
excerpt:
I have a main account, but I work with many people using Monday.com in different organizations. I end up having to switch between multiple accounts. 
Is there a way to link/mirror boards from a different organization on …

posts.author: allannudelman (Allan Nudelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a main account, but I work with many people using Monday.com in different organizations. I end up having to switch between multiple accounts.

Is there a way to link/mirror boards from a different organization on my main account? I would like to simply add and remove tasks on my main account and have them show up on other people’s to do list in their account at other organizations.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @allannudelman,

I am afraid at this time it is not possible to link boards from across seperate monday.com accounts. This is great feedback however, and something we can will certainly share internally with our product team. Just to note, whilst is isn’t possible to link boards from seperate accounts, you are able to move boards across accounts.

For more information, please feel free to reference this article - How to copy boards and dashboards between accounts.

Thank you in advance for your understanding!
